# Contributing

Thanks for considering a contribution.

## Workflow

1. Fork the repository and create a feature branch from `main`.
2. Make focused changes — one logical change per pull request.
3. Run lint, typecheck and tests locally before opening the PR.
4. Use [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) in your
   commit messages (e.g. `feat: add X`, `fix: handle Y`, `docs: …`).
5. Open a PR against `main`. Describe what changes and why.

## Code style

- Match the existing style of the file you are editing.
- Prefer small focused PRs over large omnibus changes.
- Add tests when behaviour changes.

## License

By contributing, you agree that your contributions are licensed under the
